title: My Normal Mods
description: The mods, resource packs and shaders I normally use when playing minecraft.
body:
Every mod I use on a daily basis. I made this to share what mods I like to use and it make it easy for people to find a good vanilla modpack for themselves. Feel free to add or delete the mods you don't like. Remember you can only get as much FPS as you computer components can handle.
# FPS
- With V-sync and Nvidium enabled I can reach an average of 288 FPS.
- With Nvidium enabled and v-sync disabled I can reach an average of 850 FPS.
- With Nvudium and v-sync disabled I can reach an average of 780 FPS.
- With Shaders enabled I can reach and average of 120 FPS(V-sync or not it is still 120 FPS).
- (Images on Gallery)
